name: Small Taxpayer Deferred Payment Election

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have reasonably expected and actually had less than $50,000 (quarterly) or $1,000 (annually) in total alcohol excise tax liability in the prior and current year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows small brewers to pay excise taxes quarterly (if liability <$50k) or annually (if liability <$1k) instead of semi-monthly.
